findings.evidence: Existing characteristic API is `AffineGroup.Product.pointsMulEquiv` at `code/TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/Product.lean:117`, while the new file only has `pointsFunctor_map_includeLeft_app_apply_apply` and `pointsFunctor_map_includeRight_app_apply_apply` at lines 91 and 101 and has no `pointsMulEquiv` grep hit.
findings.fix: Import `TauCeti.Algebra.AlgebraicGroup.Product` and add the finite-type wrapper of `AffineGroup.Product.pointsMulEquiv` with simp lemmas identifying its two components with the maps induced by `includeLeft` and `includeRight`, plus the inverse/product-map normal form.
findings.issue: `tensorProduct` exposes the finite-type product object and coordinate inclusions, but the public API never packages the existing product-points equivalence for `(pointsFunctor.obj (op (tensorProduct H K))).obj A`; the two point lemmas only restate precomposition with inclusions.

summary: The finite-type product object is exposed without the characteristic product-points equivalence needed to use it as the product in the functor-of-points model.
